name: md-discord-syntax-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Discord syntax extensions (core, remark, obsidian)

scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w md-discord-syntax && npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-quartz
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run build -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax
scripts.build:obsidian: npm run build -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run build -w md-discord-syntax && node scripts/sync-examples.js
scripts.test: npm run build:libs && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.test:workspaces: npm run test -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-core && npm run test -w md-discord-syntax && npm run test -w @edems-dev/md-discord-syntax-quartz && npm run test -w @edems-dev/remark-discord-syntax && node --test scripts/tests/*.test.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:libs && npm run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.release:check: npm run sync:versions && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck:workspaces && npm run test:workspaces && npm run validate

author: Edems-DEV
